transcript: Speaker A: Hello? Speaker B: Simran, meeting lo endhuku maatladaledu? [Simran, why didn't you speak in the meeting?] Speaker A: Sir, I wants speak... words not coming English. Speaker B: Simran, nee English improve kakapothe, nee job ekkuva rojulu undadhu. [Simran, if your English doesn't improve, your job won't last long.] Speaker A: Anna, bill ayyindi? [Brother, how much is the bill?] Speaker C: Ma'am, your total comes to 2000 rupees. You can pay via cash, UPI, or card, whatever is convenient for you. Speaker A: Meeru shop lo untaru, ayina meeru inta manchi English ela maatladutunnaru? [You work in a shop, yet how do you speak such good English?] Speaker C: Madam, naa English ela baagundadu. Mee degara phone unte chalu, English nerchukovadam chala easy. [Madam, my English wasn't always good. If you have a phone, learning English is very easy.] Speaker A: Phone tho aa? Ardham kaaledu. [With a phone? I don't understand.] Speaker C: Chudandi ma'am, naa degara SpeakX app undi. Ee app lo oka AI teacher untundi. Daani tho eppudaina English practice cheyachu. Ela ante office lo ela maatladali, manager tho ela maatladali, malli restaurants lo ela order cheyali ani anni nerpistundi. Daily real life situations nunchi basic nundi advance varaku chala easy ga nerchukovachu. Daily 15-20 minutes iste chalu, English motham vacchestundi meeku. Examples anni chudandi. Naa English baaga ayindi, andaru naaku respect isthunaru, naa salary kuda perigindi. Kabatti ippudu meeru kashtapadalsina pani ledu. SpeakX app lo 15 days lo English maatladadam nerchukovachu. [Look ma'am, I have the SpeakX app. In this app, there is an AI teacher. With it, you can practice English anytime. It teaches you how to speak in the office, how to talk to a manager, and how to order in restaurants. You can easily learn from basic to advanced using daily real-life situations. Just 15-20 minutes daily is enough to learn English completely. Look at all the examples. My English improved, everyone respects me, and my salary also increased. So now you don't have to struggle. You can learn to speak English in 15 days with the SpeakX app.] Speaker A: Ho avuna sir. Aithe SpeakX app nenu ippude download chestanu. [Oh really, sir? Then I will download the SpeakX app right now.]

Ma'am, your total comes to 2000 rupees. You can pay via cash, UPI, or card, whatever is convenient for you. Meeru shop lo untaru, ayina meeru inta manchi English ela maatladutunnaru? Madam naa English ela baagundadu. mee degara phone unte chalu English nerchukovadam chala easy. Phone tho aa? Ardham kaaledu. Chudandi, ma'am phone lo SpeakX app undi. Ee app lo oka AI teacher untundi. Daani tho eppudaina English practice cheyachu. Ela ante office lo ela maatladali, manager tho ela maatladali, malli restaurants lo ela order cheyali ani anni nerpistundi. Daily real life situations nunchi basic nundi advance varaku chala easy ga nerchukovachu. Daily 15-20 minutes iste chalu English motham vacchestundi meeku. Examples anni chudandi. Naa English baaga ayindi. Andaru naaku respect isthunaru. Naa salary kuda perigindi. Kabatti ippudu meeru kashtapadalsina pani ledu. SpeakX app lo 15 days lo English maatladadam Ho avuna sir. Aithe SpeakX app nenu ippude download chestanu.
summary: A woman is warned by her boss that she might lose her job due to poor English. A shopkeeper notices her distress and recommends the SpeakX app, explaining how its AI teacher helps users practice English for daily situations. Convinced, the woman decides to download the app immediately.
